title: Life in a Grid
description: A creative city-building modpack for Minecraft. Design modern or medieval towns, plan streets, and bring your world to life!
body:
### 🏙️ **Life in a Grid**

**Build. Design. Live.**

Welcome to **Life in a Grid**, a creative-focused Minecraft modpack designed for **city builders, town planners, and virtual architects**!  
Inspired by games like **Cities: Skylines**, **The Sims 4**, and others, this pack turns Minecraft into a sandbox for crafting beautiful and functional **settlements of any era** — from **rustic medieval villages** to **bustling modern cities**.

***

### 🌆 **What You Can Do**

*   🏗️ **Plan and build your dream city** — grid-based streets, cozy suburbs, or towering downtowns.
    
*   🏰 **Mix styles freely** — combine **modern**, **medieval**, **fantasy**, or **industrial** themes to create unique worlds.
    
*   🏡 **Simulate life** — populate your world with villagers, citizens, or NPCs to make your cities feel alive.
    
*   🛠️ **Use powerful building tools** — world editing, decoration mods, and quality-of-life features to make construction fun and fast.
    
*   🌇 **Design like a city planner** — organize neighborhoods, manage layouts, and bring order (or chaos) to your world’s architecture.
    

***

### 🧱 **Features**

*   Extensive **building and decoration** mod selection
    
*   **Creative tools** for planning and layout
    
*   **Optional survival elements** for players who want a challenge
    
*   Balanced mix of **modern, fantasy, and historical** building options
    

***

### 🪙 **Your World, Your Rules**

Whether you’re designing a medieval kingdom, a futuristic metropolis, or a cozy countryside town — **Life in a Grid** gives you the freedom and tools to shape your perfect world… one block at a time.
